evidence.source: GitHub read-only discovery, Railway read-only deployment/variable-presence discovery, and a direct live GET against the staging /api/health and /api/ready endpoints. No Railway or Supabase write performed.

railway.note: Merging PR #12 auto-triggered a new staging deployment (ab629441) from 73790cb, exactly as the governance model intends. It was still QUEUED at evidence-collection time; the currently live staging instance is still the prior deployment (7051fc17 @ a173dfc6). Production correctly created no deployment and remains unchanged. This sprint performed zero Railway writes and did not trigger, restart, or roll back anything.

runtime.stagingReadinessDetail: Live GET /api/ready returned 503 with missing:[] and errors:["CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL"]. SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY are present (missing:[] confirms this). CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL is present as a variable name but its value does not satisfy the exact literal required by src/config/commerce-env.ts. This corrects the prior 'missing_CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL' label, which was stale relative to current live evidence and current code (the schema treats a present-but-absent var as defaulted, not as this specific error path).

blockers: Staging readiness is degraded because CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL's live value does not match the exact required literal in src/config/commerce-env.ts; the canonical value is known from code, but changing the live variable is a platform write not authorized in this sprint.
The pending staging deployment (ab629441 @ 73790cb) had not completed at evidence-collection time; its post-deploy health/readiness are not yet confirmed.
Production readiness was not re-verified this sprint (staging-first principle; production explicitly out of scope) and remains degraded per prior evidence.
Live Railway monitoring remains deferred (Route B, unchanged from CM-GOV-2-R2); no OAuth project:viewer credential exists.
Public commerce capabilities remain unauthorized and disabled.
This staging-readiness-evidence branch requires independent review before any variable change is authorized.
nextActions: Independent review of this exact branch head (docs-and-evidence-only, zero platform writes).

Founder decision on the docs/program/STAGING_READINESS_CHANGE_REQUEST.example.json proposal: authorize a staging-only correction of CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL's value to the exact literal in src/config/commerce-env.ts.
Only after that authorization: execute the staging-only variable change under separate tooling, then re-verify /api/health and /api/ready live before any production consideration.
Re-verify the pending staging deployment (ab629441) reaches SUCCESS/RUNNING before treating 73790cb as staging's confirmed live commit in DEPLOYMENT_REGISTRY.json.
Production readiness repair remains a separate, later, separately authorized action.
